data.name: CF-Bot-Polymorphic — User-Agent-Rotating Scraper / Bot against NovaMind
data.description: Detects polymorphic (User-Agent-rotating) automation against NovaMind web properties (class_uid 4002, 'HTTP Requests'). Legitimate clients present one stable User-Agent per source; scraping and evasion frameworks rotate the UA header on nearly every request to dodge simple UA blocklists. Groups by src_ip, computes distinct_uas = estimate_distinct(http_request.user_agent), and fires when a single source presents >= 5 distinct User-Agents in the 5-minute window, surfacing total_requests and distinct_paths as breadth-of-crawl context. This UA-rotation signal is queryable and stable today; Cloudflare BotScore and the JA4 TLS fingerprint are now enabled in Logpush and serve as strong corroboration (a rotating UA riding one invariant JA4 is high-confidence bot), but are intentionally not part of the predicate here because bracket-indexed array fields (ja4_fingerprint_list[0]) do not parse in the scheduled-rule engine. Low false-positive because a >=5 distinct-UA floor from one IP in five minutes is not producible by a human on a browser. MITRE ATT&CK T1595 (Active Scanning), T1071 (Application Layer Protocol); MITRE ATLAS AML.T0002 (AI Model / data reconnaissance via scraping). Covers OneFlare scenario 07.

scheduledParams.query:
class_uid=4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests'
| let src_ip = src_endpoint.ip
| group
    distinct_uas   = estimate_distinct(http_request.user_agent),
    total_requests = count(),
    distinct_paths = estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path),
    sample_ua      = any(http_request.user_agent),
    host           = any(http_request.url.hostname),
    country        = any(src_endpoint.location.country),
    first_seen     = oldest(timestamp),
    last_seen      = newest(timestamp)
  by src_ip
| filter distinct_uas >= 5
| let detection_time = simpledateformat(last_seen, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss z')
| sort -distinct_uas
| columns detection_time, src_ip, host, distinct_uas, total_requests, distinct_paths, sample_ua, country, first_seen
| limit 100
